segments.text: Everything the Operative is made of — in one view
segments.subtitle: agent-garrison · compose + the Claude Code components, with enable/disable as a real move

beats.caption: The composition, grouped: the roles every agent needs
beats.expectedScreen: the Composition overview with an 'Every agent needs these' group containing the essential role tiles, above an 'Optional roles' group

beats.caption: Plus your Claude Code components — Skills, Hooks, Agent Tools, Plugins
beats.expectedScreen: the 'Claude Code components' group with four tiles (Skills, Hooks, Agent Tools, Plugins) showing enabled counts

beats.caption: Agent Tools — the MCP servers Claude Code loads from your ~/.claude.json
beats.expectedScreen: the MCPs list with hv-demo-mcp and sandbox-mcp rows, each showing an ENABLED badge and a Disable button

beats.caption: Disable — the server is parked out of ~/.claude.json
beats.expectedScreen: hv-demo-mcp now showing a PARKED badge and an Enable button; sandbox-mcp still ENABLED

beats.caption: Enable — moved back into ~/.claude.json. A real, reversible move
beats.expectedScreen: hv-demo-mcp back to an ENABLED badge with a Disable button; sandbox-mcp untouched throughout

beats.caption: Edit any component in place — changes write through to the on-disk file
beats.expectedScreen: the skill editor open on garrison-memory with an edited SKILL.md body, then the skill back in the list

actions.text:
---
name: garrison-memory
description: edited in the walkthrough
---
# edited in place

segments.text: Compose, run — and now see + manage everything
segments.subtitle: skills · hooks · agent tools · plugins — enable/disable is a real parked move
